offer: For property managers handling 5–15 tenant applications/month, inefficient management causes delays in tenant placement. We streamline the application process instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: inefficient management of tenant applications and property listings
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage on Indie Hackers about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management
try_it: Let users try property vacancy management and application tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
